summary: RFP Generator Citation Stripping and Export Testing - Iteration 19. Fixed JSX syntax error in RFPGenerator.jsx and verified all citation stripping functionality works correctly.

minor.issue: The 'REQUEST FOR PROPOSAL' label is in a table cell, not extractable via doc.paragraphs. This is by design for styling purposes - functional behavior correct.

passed_tests: Backend: DOCX export contains NO [Source:] citations - VERIFIED
Backend: PDF export contains NO [Source:] citations - VERIFIED
Backend: DOCX has proper Heading 1 style for sections - VERIFIED
Backend: DOCX has Table of Contents - VERIFIED
Backend: PDF has Table of Contents - VERIFIED
Backend: PDF has title page with project and client - VERIFIED
Backend: Evaluation Criteria section has substantive content (>100 chars) - VERIFIED
Backend: Submission Requirements section has substantive content (>100 chars) - VERIFIED
Backend: All sections have content in export - VERIFIED
Backend: DOCX format is valid and readable - VERIFIED
Backend: PDF format is valid and readable - VERIFIED
Backend: Invalid format returns 400 error - VERIFIED
Frontend: RFP Generator modal opens correctly - VERIFIED
Frontend: Use Sample Template works - VERIFIED
Frontend: Project Name and Client Name fields work - VERIFIED
Frontend: Preview section strips citations (regex in line 462) - CODE VERIFIED
Frontend: Copy function strips citations (stripCitations helper) - CODE VERIFIED
Frontend: Print function strips citations (stripCitations helper) - CODE VERIFIED
Frontend: Save Note strips citations (stripCitations helper) - CODE VERIFIED
Frontend: Export dropdown with DOCX and PDF options - VERIFIED

fixed_issues.issue: JSX syntax error - 'Adjacent JSX elements must be wrapped in an enclosing tag' at line 473
fixed_issues.fix: Removed duplicate closing tags (lines 467-470 had extra ))} ))} that shouldn't have been there)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend _strip_citations() helper at line 1406 correctly uses regex to remove [Source:...] tags
Backend DOCX export calls _strip_citations() at line 1655 for each section
Backend PDF export calls _strip_citations() at line 1886 for each section
Frontend stripCitations() helper at line 211 uses same regex pattern
Frontend preview renders content with inline .replace(/\[Source:[^\]]*\]/g, '') at line 462
All export paths (copyAll, saveNote, printRfp, preview) strip citations before display

success_rate.backend: 92% (12/13 tests passed - 1 minor title page text extraction issue)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (JSX error fixed, all code paths verified)

seed_data_creation: None - tests use provided section data with embedded citations
context_for_next_testing_agent: RFP Generator citation stripping feature is complete and verified. All [Source:...] citations are properly removed from DOCX exports, PDF exports, preview display, copy, print, and save note functions. Backend uses _strip_citations() helper function, frontend uses stripCitations() helper and inline regex. The only JSX syntax error that was causing 'Compiled with problems' has been fixed by removing duplicate closing tags at lines 467-470.
